category_sources: source_facts.description says it captures still images from an iSight or other video source; official repository describes command-line image capture.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository identify the project as imagesnap.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is the primary documentation surface for imagesnap.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has an official repository URL, so repo discovery was skipped per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official repository describe still-image capture from camera/video sources via command line.
